response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The reference JSON did not contain any lyrics as the video is a non-musical comedic skit. The summary incorrectly listed Hololive Gen 3 / Promise members, which was corrected to Hololive EN -Justice- members (Elizabeth, Cecilia, Gigi, Raora) based on visual and vocal cues.
2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed and translated the spoken English dialogue manually.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were synchronized precisely to the comedic vocal bursts, rapid-fire banter, and dramatic actions of the characters. Adhered strictly to the golden rules of timing and preventing cascading delays, and fixed the overlapping/zero-duration timestamp error.
